body.purpose: All running text. Moss Black or Sage Muted only.

label.purpose: Buttons, chip labels; small variant is uppercase +0.8 tracking.

ink.purpose: Raw extracted handwriting inside ink chips. Nowhere else.

shadows.name: card-float
shadows.purpose: Every resting card, paired with a 1px hairline border.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Hover/press lift and emphasized cards (next due dose). New token supporting the lifted doctrine.

shadows.name: pop
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets, dialogs — anything temporarily above the pad.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width main action; disabled state stays visible (hard gate).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0E6E5B; color: #fff; font: 700 16px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; height: 54px; width: 100%; border: none; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.06s ease, background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0A4A3E; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.985); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0E6E5B; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: rgba(14,110,91,0.35); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); cursor: default; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #DCD5C6; color: #0E6E5B; font: 600 14px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F0F5F1; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0E6E5B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ink Chip
components.description: Signature: the raw handwriting a value was read from, quoted in ballpoint blue.
components.css: .ds-ink-chip-wrap { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-chip-label { font: 700 10.5px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #A79B78; } .ds-ink-chip { background: #FFFDF4; border: 1px solid #E9E1CF; border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px 10px; font: 700 15px 'Kalam', cursive; color: #1E3D8F; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Paper Card
components.description: The resting surface: white sheet floating on the paper ground.
components.html:
Augmentin 625
Morning · Night — after food, for 5 days
components.css: .ds-paper-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E9E1CF; border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,33,28,.05), 0 6px 18px rgba(23,33,28,.06); max-width: 340px; transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-paper-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(23,33,28,.10); } .ds-card-title { font: 700 20px 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Hanken Grotesk', sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #17211C; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-body { font: 400 15px/1.47 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #5C685F; }

components.name: Flag Box
components.description: Signature: the re-check flag — warm question, EMPTY input, never a suggested value.
components.html: Please re-check this against your prescription
components.css: .ds-flag-box { background: #FBF3DD; border: 1px solid #EAD9A8; border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px; max-width: 340px; } .ds-flag-title { font: 600 14px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #A66A08; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-flag-row { display: flex; gap: 9px; } .ds-flag-input { flex: 1; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E9E1CF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 14px; font: 400 15px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #17211C; min-width: 0; } .ds-flag-input::placeholder { color: #5C685F; } .ds-flag-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0E6E5B; outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #0E6E5B; } .ds-flag-save { background: #0E6E5B; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 0 18px; font: 700 14px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-flag-save:hover { background: #0A4A3E; }

components.name: Slot Pill
components.description: The human schedule, rendered as pills.
components.css: .ds-slot-row { display: inline-flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-slot-pill { background: rgba(14,110,91,0.10); color: #0E6E5B; font: 600 12px 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; }

narrative.overview: RxScan looks like what it is: a careful, warm note-taker you hand your prescription to. The visual world is a prescription pad brought to life — soft paper backgrounds, hairline ruled borders, and the doctor's own handwriting shown in ballpoint blue exactly as it was read. The scribe never speaks over the doctor: extracted values are quoted (in ink, on paper chips), and everything the app itself says is set in friendly, rounded, generously sized type. The personality is encouraging and human — a companion for someone on a bad day — never a clinical instrument and never a corporate health portal.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-and-ink metaphor: paper surfaces, ruled hairlines, handwriting quoted in pen blue
One accent (Deep Fern green) for everything the app does; ink blue reserved for what the doctor wrote
Big, soft, reassuring components — built for a sick person's thumb
Amber strictly quarantined to re-check flags; it means "please check this yourself," nothing else
Friendly, non-advisory voice: the UI quotes the prescription, it never instructs

rules.name: The Ink Rule
rules.body: Pen Blue belongs to the doctor. It renders only what was read from the prescription — never buttons, links, headings, or chrome. If it isn't a quote from the paper, it isn't blue.

rules.name: The Amber Quarantine
rules.body: Honey Amber appears only on re-check flags, always paired with an empty input. Amber with a pre-filled suggestion is a legal violation, not a style choice.

rules.name: The Handwriting Rule
rules.body: Kalam renders only what the scribe read — the raw extracted text in ink chips. Never headings, never UI copy, never decoration.

rules.name: The sp Rule
rules.body: All type in sp, never fixed px/dp, so the system font-size setting scales everything.

rules.name: The Lifted Sheet Rule
rules.body: Depth = attention. Resting cards float, the active thing raises, overlays pop. Never stack shadows for decoration, and never a shadow without its hairline border.

dos: Do keep Pen Blue (#1E3D8F) exclusively for content read from the prescription — the Ink Rule is the brand.
Do make every touch target ≥48dp and primary buttons 54dp+ full-width; this app is used by unwell, older, and low-literacy users.
Do hold body text at ≥4.5:1 contrast: Moss Black (#17211C) or Sage Muted (#5C685F) on paper — never Sage Faint for running copy.
Do render flagged fields as empty inputs with a "please re-check against your prescription" prompt, keeping the flag box visible and revisable until the card is confirmed.
Do phrase everything the app says as a quote — "your prescription says…" — in friendly plain words; encouragement over scorekeeping ("3 of 4 taken today").
Do use motion as state: 60ms press, 150ms state change, 250ms fade-in for appearing panels; honor the system Remove-animations setting.
donts: Don't drift toward the "blue/white gradient sameness of generic healthtech (1mg, Practo, PharmEasy templates)" — no blue gradients, no stock-medical iconography, no corporate hero banners.
Don't build "hospital/enterprise software" density — no data-dense dashboards, no multi-field forms, no more than one job per screen.
Don't pre-fill, suggest, or auto-correct a flagged value — an amber flag with a suggested value is a regulatory breach (CDSCO), not a UX shortcut.
Don't use Honey Amber anywhere except re-check flags, or Clay Red for anything but errors/destructive actions.
Don't set UI copy in Kalam, use imperative medical voice ("take this at night"), or display an indication the paper doesn't state.
Don't use pure black, pure gray, or untinted white surfaces — every neutral carries the paper or moss tint.
Don't hide the disabled verify CTA — show it asleep (35% fern) so the hard gate reads as "finish checking," not "broken button."
